items.name: hero-centered
items.title: Hero Centered
items.description: Centered hero section with headline, subtitle, dual CTA, and optional input capture. Supports light/dark/gradient backgrounds, configurable currency, phone/email/custom input, and two-tone headline accent. Suitable for SaaS, EdTech, e-commerce, fintech, and any marketing landing page.

items.name: hero-split
items.title: Hero Split
items.description: Split hero with text on the left and visual on the right. Supports configurable CTA style (pill or rectangle), phone/email input capture, two-tone headline, trust signals, and floating widget slot. Works for SaaS, EdTech, e-commerce, finance, and any marketing page.

items.name: navbar-simple
items.title: Navbar Simple
items.description: Simple responsive navbar with logo, navigation links, and CTA button. Supports pill or rectangle button style, mobile hamburger menu, dark mode, and configurable social links. Works for any marketing landing page.

items.name: footer-simple
items.title: Footer Simple
items.description: Multi-column footer with logo, tagline, link groups, social icons, copyright, and legal links. Responsive grid layout. Works for any marketing page.

items.name: features-grid
items.title: Features Grid
items.description: Section with badge, headline, subtitle, and a responsive grid of feature cards (2, 3, or 4 columns). Supports icons, light/dark/surface backgrounds. Suitable for any product or service.

items.name: features-alternating
items.title: Features Alternating
items.description: Zigzag feature section with alternating text and visual layout. Supports bullet lists, per-feature CTAs, custom visuals, and light/dark/surface backgrounds. Ideal for detailed feature explainers.

items.name: pricing-simple
items.title: Pricing Simple
items.description: Simple pricing section with badge, headline, subtitle, and 1-3 pricing cards. Features a highlighted 'Most Popular' tier, responsive grid layout, and generic currency symbol support. Ideal for SaaS and subscription businesses.

items.name: pricing-toggle
items.title: Pricing Toggle
items.description: Interactive pricing section with a monthly/annually billing toggle. Includes a discount badge, dynamic price rendering, highlighted 'Most Popular' tier, and responsive grid layout. Perfect for SaaS billing.

items.name: cta-centered
items.title: CTA Centered
items.description: Centered Call to Action section. Supports dual action buttons or an inline input capture form (email/phone). Multiple background themes supported including solid brand color, dark mode, surface, and gradients.

items.name: testimonial-grid
items.title: Testimonial Grid
items.description: Masonry-style grid for displaying customer testimonials. Supports 1-3 columns depending on screen size, with star ratings, avatars, and quotes.

items.name: logo-cloud
items.title: Logo Cloud
items.description: Responsive flex-wrap grid for displaying company logos. Supports CSS grayscale/inversion filters for light and dark modes, and text fallbacks for missing logos.

items.name: hero-minimal
items.title: Hero Minimal
items.description: Typography-driven, highly minimal hero section. No visual slots, just a massive headline, subtitle, and dual CTA/input capture. Perfect for waitlists or simple landing pages.

items.name: stats-counter
items.title: Stats Counter
items.description: Grid-based statistics display. Automatically adjusts columns (2-4) based on content and screen size. Supports light, dark, surface, and brand backgrounds.

items.name: faq-accordion
items.title: FAQ Accordion
items.description: Smoothly animated FAQ accordion with accessible markup. Uses local React state for expand/collapse logic without external headless UI libraries.

items.name: cta-split
items.title: CTA Split
items.description: 50/50 side-by-side call to action section. Features text, dual CTAs, and bullet points on one side, and a designated visual slot (image/illustration) on the other. Order is reversible.
